roa.docketEntryComment: Agreement and Order Releasing Defendant on Own Recognizance
REPORTER'S TRANSCRIPT OF FELONY PLEA (03/03/22) EFILED
roa.otherSubmitter: CHRISTINE L. JORDAN, CSR NO. 12262, CCRR, RPR

roa.docketEntryComment: PD MOTION TO MODIFY CONDITIONS OF RELEASE

/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/NTW60/LD:04-05-22/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE//ACM/X:DEFENDANT IS TO ATTEND THE STOP AND CASC PROGRAMS/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/X:DEFENDANT IS TO REMAIN CONFINED WITHIN INTERIOR PREMISES OF RESIDENCE(HOME DETENTION) UNLESS AUTHORIZED BY A SFSO SWORN EMPLOYEE/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO STAY 150 YARDS AWAY FROM 1600 GEARY BLVD, SF/X:DEFENDANT SHALL POSSESS NO WEAPONS/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE AND TO SET/DOP/

/DAWT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:03-01-22/CONTD: PREHEARINGCONFERENCE/DOPC/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTEDWITH A GPS DEVICE ON HOME DETENTION AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMSOF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS ISIN PLACE,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/
